name: Paulie Gee's
teaser: Neapolitan-ish wood-fired pizza with wildly inventive combinations. Get your picture with Paulie when he's hosting.
review: Neapolitan-ish wood-fired pizza with wildly inventive and delicious flavor combinations, along with another stunner of an interior. Sit down, get out of the heat/cold, get your picture with Paulie when he's hosting and enjoy.
headsUp: Get your picture with Paulie when he is hosting. He loves it.
update: Paulie is still hosting most nights. The pies are as inventive as ever.
